title: 5 Litre Drain Unblocker | Heavy Duty Sink & Drain Cleaner for Plug Holes, Toilets, Showers & Pipes | Powerful Toilet & Sink Unblocker for Home, Office, Garage & Shops | Cleaning Supplies
features: MULTIWARE POWERFUL DRAIN UNBLOCKER - Experience the strength of MultiWare's industrial-grade formula, specifically engineered to dissolve stubborn clogs quickly and efficiently. This powerful cleaner tackles everything from hair and soap scum to grease and food particles, ensuring your drains are free-flowing and clean.

SAFE FOR ALL PIPES - MultiWare Sink and Drain Unblocker is thoughtfully formulated to be safe for use in all plumbing systems. Whether your home uses modern PVC, traditional copper, or older metal piping, you can trust our product to clear clogs without causing any damage or corrosion.

RAPID RESULTS - Get quick results when time is of the essence. Our unblocker works within minutes to remove obstructions and restore optimal flow to slow drains, saving you both time and frustration. Simply follow the easy instructions for immediate relief.

EASY TO USE - Avoid expensive plumber calls with MultiWare's easy-to-use drain solution. Our clear, step-by-step guide allows anyone to professionally handle drain maintenance. Just pour the recommended amount into the drain, wait for the formula to work its magic, and rinse away the residues.

VERSATILE APPLICATIONS - Not just for kitchen sinks, MultiWare's Drain Unblocker is also effective in bathrooms, on shower drains, and even outdoor drains exposed to leaves and debris. Its versatility makes it a must-have in any home or commercial setting to tackle a variety of blockage issues.
description: Product Description What makes MultiWare Sink and Drain Unblocker stand out from other similar products? MultiWare Sink and Drain Unblocker is formulated with a unique, fast-acting solution that quickly dissolves even the toughest clogs made from grease, hair, and soap scum. Unlike other products, it's designed to work effectively within minutes. Is the MultiWare Unblocker safe to use on all types of pipes? Absolutely! Our unblocker is safe for use in all types of plumbing, including PVC pipes, metal pipes, and even septic systems. Its gentle yet effective formula ensures that your pipes are unclogged without causing any damage. How often should I use the MultiWare Unblocker to prevent future clogs? For best results, we recommend using MultiWare Unblocker once a month as a preventive measure. This regular maintenance helps keep your drains flowing smoothly and prevents the buildup of clog-causing residues. Can the MultiWare Unblocker remove bad odors from my drains? Yes, it not only clears clogs but also tackles the unpleasant odors that can arise from stagnant water and residue build-up. With regular use, it keeps your drains smelling fresh and clean. What should I do if a single application doesn't completely clear the clog? For particularly stubborn clogs, a second application of MultiWare Unblocker may be necessary. Simply repeat the application process to ensure that all blockage material is thoroughly dissolved.
